data.title: Trump DOL rekindles joint-employer push
data.description: The Labor Department is reviewing its guidelines on when businesses can be held accountable for wage and overtime infractions carried out by their franchisees or subcontractors. This reconsideration could impact various industries, including fast-food chains, temporary staffing agencies, and construction companies.

data.title: Clariane announces the success of its offering of €500 million of senior notes
data.description: The information contained in this release is not intended for dissemination or distribution in the United States of America, Canada, Japan, Australia or any other jurisdiction where it may violate the law to do so.
Nano Dimension sells AME and Fabrica product lines, expanding their market reach with the recent transaction.

data.title: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals Announces Name Change to Stablecoin Development Corporation, Reports Initial Staking Rewards, and Provides SKY Token Holdings Update
data.description: Stablecoin Development Corporation recently secured a substantial $134 million investment from R01 Fund LP, Framework Ventures, Tether Investments, S.A. de C.V., and Sky Frontier Foundation. This investment has enabled the acquisition of 2.06 billion SKY tokens by the corporation.

data.title: Multitude Capital Oyj & Multitude AG repurchased more outstanding capital notes, boosting their financial portfolio.
data.description: In a recent report, it was highlighted that a total of 2,500 individuals have been affected by the ongoing health crisis in the area. The local authorities have confirmed 450 new cases in the past week alone, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to 10,000. Additionally, it was noted that 150 individuals have sadly lost their lives due to the virus. The situation remains critical as hospitals are reaching full capacity, with 300 patients currently in critical condition. The government has announced that they will be implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including a mandatory mask mandate in all public spaces. Residents are urged to follow health guidelines and protocols to protect themselves and others during this challenging time.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Spike 1,300 Points, Oil Prices Dive On Trump-Iran Ceasefire; What To Do Now
data.description: Stock market futures associated with the Dow Jones Industrial Average surged by 1,300 points while oil prices experienced a significant drop. President Trump has agreed to temporarily cease attacks on Iran for a period of two weeks. Iran has announced intentions to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, albeit with certain conditions attached. Investors and traders are advised to monitor the situation closely following the sharp market movements.

data.title: Inspira Technologies Appoints Yoav Rozanovich as Chief Business Officer to Drive Immediate Revenue Growth and Quantum Expansion
data.description: Inspira Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd disclosed the hiring of Yoav Rozanovich as Chief Business Officer (CBO), aiming to enhance its commercial activities after venturing into quantum computing connectivity and taking over the Additive Manufacturing of Electronics (AME) division from Nano Dimension Ltd. This move comes after the company's expansion and acquisition from Nano Dimension Ltd. (Nasdaq: NNDM). With this change, Inspira Technologies aims to bolster its business operations in these new areas.

data.title: Trends in Housing Affordability: Who Can Currently Afford to Buy a Home?
data.description: Currently, the housing market is seeing a boost in affordability as mortgage rates have dropped to under 6.5%. This decrease has made purchasing a home more feasible for a larger number of individuals. The shift in rates has allowed a significant number of potential buyers to enter the market and consider homeownership. This development is helping to increase the pool of people who can afford to buy a home, potentially leading to a rise in home sales and a more active real estate market.

data.title: Progressives tout Virginia wins as key to 'affordability' message
data.description: Virginia state lawmakers have recently passed a set of bills that are being hailed by progressive labor advocates as a promising model for Democratic victories in the upcoming midterm elections. This move has sparked optimism among supporters as they see this as a potential game-changer. The bills have gained significant attention due to their potential impact, with many seeing them as a blueprint for success on a national scale. This development has garnered widespread support and enthusiasm within the Democratic party as they gear up for the upcoming elections.

data.title: Aterian Provides Update on Strategic Alternatives Process
data.description: In Summit, New Jersey on March 23, 2026, Aterian, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATER) disclosed details regarding its Strategic Alternative Process. The company, a player in the consumer products sector, shared this update today.

data.title: Best Home Saunas of 2026: 8 Brands Compared by Heat Type, Construction, Safety Data, and Warranty
data.description: A comparison was conducted on different types of home saunas including infrared, traditional, and hybrid models, evaluating aspects such as heat performance, wood quality, EMF and VOC levels, red light therapy capabilities, warranty coverage, and pricing. The saunas ranged in price from $1,800 to $11,099. This assessment took place in San Diego on April 18, 2026. Sun Home Saunas, an infrared sauna company ranked in the Inc. 5000 list, was involved in this evaluation.

data.title: CAS Holdings Appoints Patrick McDermott as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: The recent leadership transition at CAS Holdings in Franklin, Massachusetts on April 18, 2026, is set to drive the company towards sustained growth and innovative solutions for customers. As a key player in industrial automation distribution, engineering, and integration, CAS Holdings welcomes Patrick McDermott to lead the way. The move comes as the company aims to build on its strong foundation and expand its reach in the industry.
Crypto Whale Moves $225 Million USDC Before Pulling $77.52 Million Ethereum

data.title: Iran sees BTC as a strategic asset, but USDt prevails for oil tolls: BPI. Bitcoin for payment due to confiscation resistance.
data.description: The Iranian government has opted for Bitcoin as a payment method for oil tolls because of its resilience to confiscation. However, to date, only dollar stablecoins have been utilized for this purpose.

data.title: How Will Dow Jones Futures, Oil Prices React As Iran, Hormuz News Turns?
data.description: As Iran asserts its continued strict control over the Strait of Hormuz, market participants are closely watching for potential reactions. The status of this vital waterway could impact global markets, particularly with Tesla's earnings on the horizon. Traders are monitoring Dow Jones futures and oil prices for any signs of volatility or shifts in response to the ongoing developments between Iran and the strategic water passage. The situation remains fluid, and investors are on high alert for any potential market implications.

data.title: Hollywood talent agency, previously Wasserman, now The Team, receives interest from buyers after founder's ties to Epstein revealed.
data.description: The agency previously known as Wasserman has rebranded to The Team and is now up for sale following the exposure of its founder's emails in the Epstein files.

data.title: Pastor Dino Rizzo Marks 100 Days to Serve Day Ahead of Global Outreach Initiative
data.description: Pastor Dino Rizzo recently emphasized the significance of reaching the 100-day mark leading up to Serve Day 2026. Thousands of churches are gearing up to engage in acts of compassion on July 11th to benefit their communities. This event brings together church leaders and teams in preparation for the impactful day. The announcement was made in Birmingham, Alabama on April 18, 2026.

data.title: Inspira Completes Commercial Deployment of its AME System at a Tier-1 U.S. Defense Entity
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., an Israel-based company, recently disclosed that they have effectively delivered and had an Additively Manufactured Electronics ("AME") system accepted at a Tier-1 U.S. defense customer site. This accomplishment was done under a commercial agreement and marks a significant milestone for the company. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IINN.

data.title: ENvue Issues Stockholder Letter & Provides Corporate Update
data.description: Today, on April 16, 2026, in Tyler, Texas, ENvue Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: FEED), a company focused on medical technology, particularly in non-invasive solutions for enteral care in clinical and home care environments, provided a stockholder letter and corporate update.

data.title: Pliant Therapeutics Announces Presentation of Updated Data from the Phase 1 Trial of PLN-101095  in Patients with ICI-Refractory Solid Tumors at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: The study results revealed that the responses were confirmed with an average maximum tumor reduction of 89% from the initial baseline. Additionally, the median time on treatment extended to 19 months.
